title: Mythic Metals+
description: This is a modpack for with Mythic Metals and everything it needs!
body:
# Mythic Metals+
This is a modpack with Mythic Metals and everything it needs!
Mods included:
- [Mythic Metals by Noaaan](https://modrinth.com/mod/mythicmetals)
- [Fabric API by modmuss50](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Alloy Forgery by many people](https://modrinth.com/mod/alloy-forgery)
- [oωo (owo-lib) by glisco](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib)
- [Mod Menu by Prospector](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
